desc: Prisma models (InstitutionProfile, InstitutionTeam, DataSource, CapabilityCatalog, FeasibilityRequest, FormTemplate, FormField, FieldAnswer, CohortDefinition, PriorFormAnswer, AuditLog), all siteId-scoped; db push migrates cleanly
xlsx→seed import script populates FormTemplate (Modelo Canonico) + CapabilityCatalog (Catalogo de Capacidade)
classifier label fixture derived from Banco de Perguntas (32 fields → archetype+concept labels)
intake extended to emit FormField[] + template fingerprint (MSD recognition)
classifier synonym→code→shortlist→unmapped + precision/recall vitest test vs Banco de Perguntas labels
profileResolver (A) returns a Metric from InstitutionProfile
capabilityResolver (B) returns a Metric from CapabilityCatalog via conceptResolver
questionnaire criteria wired to matcher/engine + soften; per-criterion deltas; small-cell suppression preserved
PriorFormAnswer store + retrieval (keyword/embedding-lite RAG over prior answers)
narrativeResolver (D) on the parse.ts LLM-containment pattern; always status=proposed
review-workspace route under src/app/site/feasibility/; D answers never auto-approved
AuditLog versioning: every answer edit writes a new version + audit row
edit→synonym write-back + RAG index (the learning loop)
structured answers feed existing scorecard Metrics (do not fork src/lib/metric)
feasibility inbox reuses Consultation/Response primitives (no parallel dispatch table)
